entities.name: Tria Prima
entities.description: The three fundamental principles identified by Paracelsus representing spiritual forces.

entities.name: Salt
entities.description: The third fundamental principle in Paracelsian doctrine, corresponding to the body.

attributes.symbolic_meaning: coagulated light of the world, secret central fire, salt of wisdom

entities.name: Sulphur
entities.description: A fundamental principle mediating the position of the soul.

entities.name: Mercury
entities.description: The fluid principle with a propensity to sublimation.

entities.name: Saturn
entities.description: Identified with Chronos, the god of time; represents the outermost circle of the underworld.

entities.name: Opus Magnum Phases (Color-based)
entities.description: The division of the alchemical work into four stages based on color.

entities.name: Pernety's Alchemical/Zodiac System
entities.description: A division of 'lower astronomy' mapping 12 alchemical processes to the signs of the zodiac.

entities.name: Ouroboros
entities.description: The sea-monster/serpent representing the celestial, primordial water in Ophite cosmology.

entities.name: Lapis
entities.description: The goal of the alchemical work, achieved by elevating the fallen creation.

attributes.process: sublimation and elevation from prima materia
